# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

@Greeting(name="Jenkins")
@GrabUrl(urls=[])


pipeline {
  agent any

  stages {
    stage('Download') {
      when {
        changeset '**'

        // Uncomment to use a custom user agent.
        // environment{ JENKINS_AGENT_UAS= "My-User-Agent" }

        input 'Are you sure?' message: 'Do you want to deploy the artifact?'
        cleanWs()

      }
      steps {
        withEnv(["DOWNLOAD_URL_ONE=" + params["DOWNLOAD_URL_ONE"]]) {
          sh '''
            curl -v ${DOWNLOAD_URL} > $JENKINS_NODE_NAME
          '''
        }

        withEnv([
                   "DOWNLOAD_URL_TWO=" + params["DOWNLOAD_URL_TWO"],
                   "SERVER_URL=http://$SERVER_IP"
                 ]) {
           stash includes: '**/*.jar', name:'application', useDefaultExcludes: false
         }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy') {

      when{
        changeset '**'

        input 'Are you sure?' message: 'Do you want to deploy the artifact?'
        cleanWs()

      }
      steps {


        script{
          if (params.BRANCH_NAME){
            def branchName = params.BRANCH_NAME

            if( branchName != null && branchName == "prod"){
              sh '''
                echo $branchName
              '''

              deploy_stage(params)


            }else{
              echo 'not in production branch'
            }

          }

        }

      }

    }

  }


}
